title: Reports
metaTitle: Business Reports & Analytics · Real-Time Dashboards · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Live dashboards and reports on sales, cash, profit, tax and stock. Drill to source, export to Excel or PDF, in any currency. Works worldwide.
keywords: business reports, analytics dashboard, sales report, profit and loss report, tax report, financial reports, export to excel
heroTitle: Decisions backed by live numbers
heroSubtitle: Every sale, payment and movement rolls up into clear dashboards and reports, in real time. See what's selling, who owes you and where your profit is, then export it anywhere.

features.title: Sales analytics
features.desc: See top products, best clients and trends over any period.

features.title: Financial reports
features.desc: Profit and loss, balance sheet, cash flow and aged receivables.

features.title: Tax reports
features.desc: Input and output tax summaries ready for your VAT return.

features.title: Stock reports
features.desc: Valuation, movement and low-stock reports across warehouses.

features.title: Drill to source
features.desc: Click any figure to trace it back to the exact document behind it.

features.title: Always current
features.desc: Reports update live as transactions happen, no overnight batch.

sections.title: One dashboard for the whole business
sections.body: Open Paper & Pen and see the numbers that matter: cash in the bank, who owes you, what's selling and your profit this month. Because everything posts in real time, the dashboard is the truth, not last week's snapshot.
items: Cash, debtors and profit up front
Filter by period, client or product

sections.title: Reports your accountant and board will trust
sections.body: Drill from any report straight to the source document, then export to Excel or PDF for your accountant, bank or board. Report in any currency, and switch the interface to Arabic, English, Hindi, Bengali or Urdu so everyone reads the same numbers in their own language.

faqs.a: Reports is an optional paid add-on. The free-forever core includes invoicing dashboards, and the full reporting suite is available when you need deeper analytics.
Yes. Every transaction posts live, so dashboards and reports always reflect the current state of your business.
Yes. Export to Excel or PDF to share with your accountant, bank or board.

faqs.q: Can I trace a number to its source?
faqs.a: Yes. Click any figure to drill down to the exact invoice, payment or journal entry behind it.
Yes. Report in any currency and view the interface in five languages.

ctaSub: Start free with invoicing and add Reports for live dashboards and export-ready analytics.
